vocab.ex: 听说你这个周末要搬家，是真的吗？
vocab.expy: Tīngshuō nǐ zhège zhōumò yào bānjiā, shì zhēn de ma?
vocab.ex_uz: Eshitishimcha, shu dam olish kunlari ko'chyapsan, rostmi?
vocab.ex_ru: Слышал, ты в эти выходные переезжаешь, это правда?
vocab.ex_en: I heard you're moving this weekend, is that true?

vocab.ex: 听说你这个周末要搬家，是真的吗？
vocab.expy: Tīngshuō nǐ zhège zhōumò yào bānjiā, shì zhēn de ma?
vocab.ex_uz: Eshitishimcha, shu dam olish kunlari ko'chyapsan, rostmi?
vocab.ex_ru: Слышал, ты в эти выходные переезжаешь, это правда?
vocab.ex_en: I heard you're moving this weekend, is that true?

vocab.expy: Wǒ yǐjīng zhǎo hǎo le xīn fángzi.
vocab.ex_en: I've already found a new place.

vocab.expy: Suīrán bú dà, dànshì hěn ānjìng.
vocab.ex_ru: Хоть и небольшой, зато очень тихий.
vocab.ex_en: Although it's not big, it's very quiet.

vocab.expy: Suīrán bú dà, dànshì hěn ānjìng.
vocab.ex_ru: Хоть и небольшой, зато очень тихий.
vocab.ex_en: Although it's not big, it's very quiet.

vocab.en: to count as, to be considered

vocab.ex: 骑自行车大概十五分钟。
骑自行车大概十五分钟。
现在的房子太吵了，晚上经常睡不着。
vocab.expy: Xiànzài de fángzi tài chǎo le, wǎnshang jīngcháng shuì bu zháo.
vocab.ex_uz: Hozirgi uyim juda shovqinli, kechasi ko'pincha uxlay olmayman.
vocab.ex_ru: Нынешний дом слишком шумный, по ночам часто не могу уснуть.
vocab.ex_en: My current place is too noisy; I often can't fall asleep at night.

vocab.ex: 现在的房子太吵了，晚上经常睡不着。
vocab.expy: Xiànzài de fángzi tài chǎo le, wǎnshang jīngcháng shuì bu zháo.
vocab.ex_uz: Hozirgi uyim juda shovqinli, kechasi ko'pincha uxlay olmayman.
vocab.ex_ru: Нынешний дом слишком шумный, по ночам часто не могу уснуть.
vocab.ex_en: My current place is too noisy; I often can't fall asleep at night.

vocab.en: to be unable to fall asleep
vocab.ex_ru: По ночам часто не могу уснуть.
vocab.ex_en: I often can't fall asleep at night.

vocab.expy: Nǐ dōngxi dōu zhǔnbèi le ma?
vocab.ex_en: Have you got all your things ready?

vocab.ex: 可以帮我打扫一下房间。
vocab.expy: Kěyǐ bāng wǒ dǎsǎo yíxià fángjiān.
vocab.ex_en: You could help me clean the room.

sentences.text_original: 听说你这个周末要搬家，是真的吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tīng shuō nǐ zhè ge zhōu mò yào bān jiā, shì zhēn de ma?
sentences.text_translation: Eshitishimcha, shu dam olish kunlari ko'chyapsan, rostmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Слышал, ты в эти выходные переезжаешь, это правда?
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard you're moving this weekend, is that true?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是真的。我已经找好了新房子。
sentences.pinyin: Shì zhēn de. Wǒ yǐ jīng zhǎo hǎo le xīn fáng zi.
sentences.text_translation: Rost. Men yangi uy topib qo'ydim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Правда. Я уже нашёл новый дом.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's true. I've already found a new place.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xīn fáng zi zěn me yàng?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Suī rán bú dà, dàn shì hěn ān jìng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хоть и небольшой, зато очень тихий.
sentences.text_translation_en: Although it's not big, it's very quiet.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不算远。骑自行车大概十五分钟。
sentences.pinyin: Bú suàn yuǎn. Qí zì xíng chē dà gài shí wǔ fēn zhōng.
sentences.text_translation: Unchalik uzoq emas. Velosipedda taxminan o'n besh daqiqa.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не очень далеко. На велосипеде примерно пятнадцать минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not really far. About fifteen minutes by bike.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那很方便。你为什么想搬家？
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn fāng biàn. Nǐ wèi shén me xiǎng bān jiā?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это удобно. Почему ты хочешь переехать?
sentences.text_translation_en: That's convenient. Why do you want to move?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 现在的房子太吵了，晚上经常睡不着。
sentences.pinyin: Xiàn zài de fáng zi tài chǎo le, wǎn shàng jīng cháng shuì bu zháo.
sentences.text_translation: Hozirgi uyim juda shovqinli, kechasi ko'pincha uxlay olmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нынешний дом слишком шумный, по ночам часто не могу уснуть.
sentences.text_translation_en: My current place is too noisy; I often can't fall asleep at night.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yí gè rén bān ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不是。我请了两个朋友帮忙。
sentences.pinyin: Bú shì. Wǒ qǐng le liǎng gè péng yǒu bāng máng.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Men ikki do'stimni yordamga chaqirdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я попросил двух друзей помочь.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I've asked two friends to help.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ dōng xī dōu zhǔn bèi le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you got all your things ready?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没有。我今天晚上要收拾书和衣服。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi yǒu. Wǒ jīn tiān wǎn shàng yào shōu shi shū hé yī fu.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q. Bugun kechqurun kitob va kiyimlarimni yig'ishtirishim kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Сегодня вечером соберу книги и одежду.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. Tonight I need to pack up my books and clothes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xū yào wǒ bāng nǐ ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 如果你有时间，可以帮我打扫一下房间。
sentences.pinyin: Rú guǒ nǐ yǒu shí jiān, kě yǐ bāng wǒ dǎ sǎo yí xià fáng jiān.
sentences.text_translation: Vaqting bo'lsa, xonani tozalashga yordam berishing mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если есть время, помоги убрать комнату.
sentences.text_translation_en: If you have time, you could help me clean the room.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Méi wèn tí. Wǒ xià wǔ guò qù.
sentences.text_translation_en: No problem. I'll come over in the afternoon.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 太好了。搬完以后，我请你们吃大餐！
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le. Bān wán yǐ hòu, wǒ qǐng nǐ men chī dà cān!
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi. Ko'chib bo'lgach, hammangizni katta ziyofatga taklif qilaman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично. После переезда угощу вас всех большим обедом!
sentences.text_translation_en: Great. After the move, I'll treat you all to a big meal!
sentences.speaker: B
